Perfect! I've successfully updated the test assertion strings in `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/tests/commands/pr/test_close.py`. Here's what was changed:
## Changes Made
1. **`"Closed plan #42"` → `"Closed PR #42"`** - Updated all occurrences (found in lines 77, 180, 240, 296, 472, 538, 602)
2. **`"Plan #999 not found"` → `"PR #999 not found"`** - Updated the occurrence in line 107
3. **`"Invalid plan number or URL"` → `"Invalid PR number or URL"`** - Updated occurrences in lines 324 and 353
All replacements were made with `replace_all=true` to ensure consistency throughout the file. The changes only affected assertion strings and did not modify: - Test function names (e.g., `test_close_plan_with_plan_number`) - Docstrings (e.g., `"""Test closing a plan with plan number."""`) - Variable names (e.g., `plan_issue`) - Comments or other non-assertion text
